old_example: The company decided to adopt a more aggressive approach to marketing in the international sector.
new_example: The company adopted a more aggressive approach to marketing.
new_translation: Công ty đã áp dụng một cách tiếp cận quyết liệt hơn đối với tiếp thị.

old_example: The deadline for the international expansion project is approaching rapidly, so we must work faster.
new_example: The deadline is approaching rapidly, so we must work faster.
new_translation: Thời hạn đang đến gần nhanh chóng, nên chúng ta phải làm nhanh hơn.

old_example: Please ensure that you are dressed appropriately for the formal international business dinner tonight.
new_example: Please ensure that you are dressed appropriately for dinner tonight.
new_translation: Vui lòng đảm bảo rằng bạn ăn mặc phù hợp cho bữa tối nay.

old_example: The committee discussed the appropriateness of the new marketing campaign for our target audience.
new_example: The committee discussed the appropriateness of the new campaign.
new_translation: Ủy ban đã thảo luận về tính phù hợp của chiến dịch mới.

old_example: The board of directors gave its official approval for the new international expansion plan.
new_example: The board gave its official approval for the expansion plan.
new_translation: Hội đồng quản trị đã chính thức phê duyệt kế hoạch mở rộng.

old_example: The project cannot proceed until we have received all the necessary government approvals and permits.
new_example: The project needs all necessary government approvals to proceed.
new_translation: Dự án cần có tất cả phê duyệt từ chính phủ để tiến hành.

old_example: The board of directors is expected to approve the new annual budget this afternoon.
new_example: The board is expected to approve the new budget today.
new_translation: Hội đồng quản trị dự kiến sẽ phê duyệt ngân sách mới hôm nay.

old_example: The new international marketing strategy was officially approved by the board of directors yesterday.
new_example: The new marketing strategy was officially approved yesterday.
new_translation: Chiến lược tiếp thị mới đã chính thức được phê duyệt hôm qua.
